title: Refinery — HTML for RAG / LLM
description: Clean HTML for RAG and LLM pipelines. Paste HTML or pass URLs. Strips scripts, CSS, and layout noise. Returns text + word_count for token budgeting.

urls.title: URLs to clean
urls.description: Fetch each URL and return clean text. Best for Demo 1 (example.com) or Demo 2 (bbc.com/news) from the README.

raw_payload.title: HTML to clean (paste)
raw_payload.description: Paste raw HTML from your crawler. Use when you already have HTML on disk or in your pipeline (see README Demo 3).
raw_payload.prefill:
Home · Pricing · Login

We reduced embedding cost by cleaning HTML before chunking.
